2605.22093.title: Knowledge Graph Re-engineering Along the Ontological Continuum (extended version)
2605.22093.paper_summary: Knowledge graphs have become the primary vehicle for data integration and are critical to the success of modern AI, but the diversity of KG modelling practices, from lightweight vocabularies to richly axiomatised ontologies, makes integration and reuse expensive and brittle. This challenge is particularly acute in neuro-symbolic AI, where bridging neural and symbolic components depends on the ability to reengineer KGs to fit new requirements; GenAI now offers unprecedented automation capability, but without a principled understanding of the KG space, such automation remains conceptually ungrounded. We introduce the ontological continuum as that missing conceptualisation, a theoretical construct a theoretical construct whose characterisation framework is defined by two orthogonal distinctions: semantics vs pragmatics, and properties vs affordances; together these define a vocabulary to describe, compare, navigate, and transform KGs across the full range of modelling practices. The methodological stance is empirical: rather than prescribing how KGs should be modelled, the continuum aims to define a theory of the existent, derived from observation of real-world KG engineering practices and whose structure can be made formally explicit, for example, through Formal Concept Analysis (FCA). We ground the vision through a case study on provenance knowledge, showing how a single concern manifests differently across the continuum. We articulate five open research challenges and invite the community to develop the ontological continuum as a shared research agenda.
2605.22093.paper_summary_zh: 知識圖譜已成為數據整合的主要工具，對現代人工智慧的成功至關重要，但知識圖譜建模實踐的多樣性，從輕量級詞彙到豐富的公理化本體，使得整合和重用變得昂貴且脆弱。這一挑戰在神經符號人工智慧中尤為明顯，因為橋接神經和符號組件依賴於重新設計知識圖譜以適應新需求的能力；生成式人工智慧現在提供了前所未有的自動化能力，但如果沒有對知識圖譜領域的原則性理解，這種自動化仍然在概念上缺乏基礎。我們引入本體連續體作為這一缺失的概念化，這是一個理論構造，其特徵化框架由兩個正交的區分定義：語義 vs 實用性，以及屬性 vs 可能性；這些共同定義了一個詞彙，用於描述、比較、導航和轉換知識圖譜，涵蓋所有建模實踐的範疇。方法論立場是實證的：與其規定知識圖譜應如何建模，連續體旨在定義一種存在的理論，這一理論源於對現實世界知識圖譜工程實踐的觀察，其結構可以明確地形式化，例如，通過形式概念分析（FCA）。我們通過一個關於來源知識的案例研究來落實這一願景，展示了單一關注點如何在連續體中以不同方式表現。我們闡述了五個開放的研究挑戰，並邀請社群將本體連續體發展為共享的研究議程。
2605.22093.author: Enrico Daga et.al.
2605.22093.authors: Enrico Daga, Valentina Tamma, Terry Payne
